reasoning: The 2024-25 UEFA Champions League Final will be contested between Inter Milan and Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) on May 31, 2025. Betting markets indicate PSG as the favorite. Initial ESPN BET odds had PSG at -180 and Inter at +130 to lift the trophy, implying a true probability of ~40.3% for Inter. BetMGM's 90-minute odds (PSG +120, Inter +225, Draw +260) suggest a ~41-43% overall chance for Inter to ultimately lift the trophy when factoring in the likelihood of a draw going to extra time/penalties. While Opta's supercomputer is slightly more generous with a 46.4% prediction for Inter, the betting consensus heavily centers closer to the low-40s. Additionally, recent news on May 21 confirmed that Inter's captain and star forward, Lautaro Martinez, is returning from an injury ahead of schedule — a notable boost that firms up their chances and justifies a slight positive adjustment from the initial market opening lines, settling the firm probability at 42%.
